message:
Thanksgiving Baskets
Support families in need this holiday by donating all of the grocery items needed to make a Thanksgiving Meal. Donations include canned goods, non-perishable items, and grocery gift cards for residents of the Domestic Violence Shelters at Artemis House/NOVACO. The deadline for donations is Sunday, November 16th. Please reach out to Megan Browning for more information at Megs123450@gmail.com.

Deck the Halls of Living Savior!
We are currently recruiting holiday helpers to get Living Savior ready for the holiday season on Friday, November 28th. There will be opportunities to help set up the Christmas tree sales lot and to decorate the Christmas tree in the sanctuary, foyer, and preschool. Please consider donating your time and register through the sign-up genius. https://www.signupgenius.com/go/4090A4BABA62DA3F58-59322072-holiday

Christmas Tree Sales begin!
Living Savior has hosted a Christmas Tree lot for over 35 years thanks to the wonderful service and coordination of our church community. Christmas Tree Sales will begin on Friday, November 28th and run through December 20th. Please consider donating your time to help with this season's tree sales through the sign-up genius! https://www.signupgenius.com/go/4090A4BABA62DA3F58-59323221-christmas
